qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_per_emp_ddo as oi_per_emp_ddo, t0.c_empresa as c_empresa, t0.c_sexo as c_sexo, t0.f_ingreso as f_ingreso, t0.e_numero_legajo as e_numero_legajo, t0.f_antiguedad_rec as f_antiguedad_rec, t0.e_cant_dias_vac as e_cant_dias_vac, t0.c_contrato as c_contrato, t0.f_inicio_contrato as f_inicio_contrato, t0.f_fin_contrato as f_fin_contrato, t0.c_posicion_ult as c_posicion_ult, t0.e_duracion_ctrato as e_duracion_ctrato, t0.c_unidad_tiempo as c_unidad_tiempo, t0.e_q_renov_ctrato as e_q_renov_ctrato, t0.l_eventual as l_eventual, t0.c_agencia as c_agencia, t0.l_confidencial as l_confidencial, t0.f_efectividad as f_efectividad, t0.f_inactividad as f_inactividad, t0.c_nro_insc_IG as c_nro_insc_IG, t0.e_solic_ingreso as e_solic_ingreso, t0.n_porc_jor_red as n_porc_jor_red, t0.f_egreso as f_egreso, t0.c_nro_obra_social as c_nro_obra_social, t0.f_desde_posicion as f_desde_posicion, t0.c_puesto_ult as c_puesto_ult, t0.f_desde_puesto as f_desde_puesto, t0.c_centro_costo_ult as c_centro_costo_ult, t0.f_desde_ccosto as f_desde_ccosto, t0.c_categoria_ult as c_categoria_ult, t0.f_desde_categoria as f_desde_categoria, t0.c_convenio as c_convenio, t0.oi_funcion as oi_funcion, t0.n_est_pas_mes as n_est_pas_mes, t0.c_tipo_personal as c_tipo_personal, t0.c_obra_social as c_obra_social, t0.c_motivo_eg as c_motivo_eg, t0.c_plan_os as c_plan_os, t0.c_sindicato as c_sindicato, t0.c_nro_sindicato as c_nro_sindicato, t0.c_tipo_servicio as c_tipo_servicio, t0.c_seguro_soc as c_seguro_soc, t0.c_nro_seguro_soc as c_nro_seguro_soc, t0.c_prestadora as c_prestadora, t0.c_nro_prestadora as c_nro_prestadora, t0.n_porc_emp_prest as n_porc_emp_prest, t0.c_plan_presta as c_plan_presta, t0.c_indic_activo as c_indic_activo, t0.c_forma_pago as c_forma_pago, t0.f_ult_notif as f_ult_notif, t0.n_ult_remun as n_ult_remun, t0.l_disponib_viajar as l_disponib_viajar, t0.c_personal as c_personal, t0.d_ape_y_nom as d_ape_y_nom, t0.f_nacim as f_nacim, t0.l_jubilado as l_jubilado, t0.c_calificacion as c_calificacion, t0.c_estado_civil as c_estado_civil, t0.c_afjp as c_afjp, t0.c_provincia_suc as c_provincia_suc, t0.c_localidad_suc as c_localidad_suc, t0.c_cta_bancaria as c_cta_bancaria, t0.c_tarjeta as c_tarjeta, t0.c_cbu as c_cbu, t0.oi_ubicacion_ddo as oi_ubicacion_ddo, t0.c_sucursal as c_sucursal, t0.c_nivel_estudio as c_nivel_estudio, t0.c_estudio as c_estudio, t0.c_parametro as c_parametro, t0.c_zona_sijp as c_zona_sijp, t0.c_sit_sijp as c_sit_sijp, t0.c_param_cond_sijp as c_param_cond_sijp, t0.c_cantfam19518sijp as c_cantfam19518sijp, t0.c_siniestrado_sijp as c_siniestrado_sijp, t0.c_mod_cont_sijp as c_mod_cont_sijp, t0.n_bruto_ant as n_bruto_ant, t0.n_deduc_ant as n_deduc_ant, t0.n_reten_ant as n_reten_ant, t0.n_bruto_nr_ant as n_bruto_nr_ant, t0.n_ap_jub_ant as n_ap_jub_ant, t0.n_ap_os_ant as n_ap_os_ant, t0.n_ap_ley_ant as n_ap_ley_ant, t0.n_tot_sret_ult as n_tot_sret_ult, t0.n_tot_nsret_ult as n_tot_nsret_ult, t0.n_tot_contrib_ult as n_tot_contrib_ult, t0.l_agente_ret as l_agente_ret, t0.c_per_emp_ddo as CODE, t0.d_per_emp_ddo as TEXT, t0.oi_liquidacion_ddo as oi_liquidacion_ddo FROM LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as t0 ORDER BY oi_per_emp_ddo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_per_emp_ddo as oi_per_emp_ddo FROM LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as t0 ORDER BY oi_per_emp_ddo asc')/ROWS/ROW

NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LegajoEmpresaDDO.PER_EMP_DDO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo) as CNT from LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_per_emp_ddo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

resource.declare: <FILTRO oi_personal_emp="1429" oi_cab_conc_ddo="157" oi_empresa_ddo="1102" oi_var_ejec_ddo="62" oi_codif_ddo="17" oi_liquidacion="48" />
resource.name: QryLegajo

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT tp.oi_personal_emp , tt.c_empresa , tp.f_ingreso , tp.e_numero_legajo , tp.f_antiguedad_rec , tp.e_anios_antig , tp.e_cant_dias_vac , te.c_contrato , tp.f_inicio_contrato , tp.f_fin_contrato , tu.c_posicion as c_posicion_ult , tp.e_duracion_ctrato , tq.c_unidad_tiempo , tp.e_q_renov_ctrato , tp.l_eventual , ta.c_agencia , tp.l_confidencial , tp.f_efectividad , tp.f_inactividad , tp.c_nro_insc_IG , tp.e_solic_ingreso , tp.n_porc_jor_red , tp.f_egreso , tp.c_nro_obra_social , tp.f_desde_posicion , ti.c_puesto as c_puesto_ult, tp.f_desde_puesto , t08.c_centro_costo as c_centro_costo_ult , tp.f_desde_ccosto , t18c.c_categoria as c_categoria_ult, tp.f_desde_categoria , t18c.c_cargo_siafca, t18c.c_clase_cargo, t18.c_convenio , t03f.c_funcion , tp.n_est_pas_mes , t11.c_tipo_personal , t06.c_obra_social , per22.c_motivo_eg_per as c_motivo_eg , t06p.c_plan_os , t30.c_sindicato , tp.c_nro_sindicato , per07.c_tipo_servicio , per25.c_seguro_soc , tp.c_nro_seguro_soc , per21.c_indic_activo , per31.c_forma_pago , per31p.c_forma_pago as forma_pago_alt , tp.f_ult_notif , tp.n_ult_remun , tp.f_desde_remun , tp.l_disponib_viajar , t.c_cta_bancaria , t.c_tarjeta , t.c_cbu , org03u.c_ubicacion , liq22s.c_sucursal , liq22s.d_sucursal , liq22s.oi_banco , t.n_bruto_ant , t.n_deduc_ant , t.n_reten_ant , t.n_bruto_nr_ant , t.n_ap_jub_ant , t.n_ap_os_ant , t.n_ap_ley_ant , t.l_agente_ret, tp.oi_personal, mc.c_mod_contr FROM LIQ07_PERSONAL as t, LIQ93_EMPRESAS as tt, per02_personal_emp as tp, PER28_CONTRATOS as te, ORG04_POSICIONES as tu, ORG04_PUESTOS as ti, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO as tq, PER32_AGENCIAS as ta, ORG08_CS_COSTO as t08, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as t18c, ORG18_CONVENIOS as t18, ORG03_FUNCIONES as t03f, PER11_TIPOS_PERS as t11, PER06_OBRAS_SOC as t06, PER06_PLANES_OS as t06p, PER30_SINDICATOS as t30, PER22_MOT_EG_PER as per22, PER07_TIPOS_SERV as per07, PER25_SEGUROS_SOC as per25, PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO as per21, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as per31, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as per31p, org03_ubicaciones as org03u, LIQ22_BANCOS_SUCUR as liq22s, PER35_MOD_CONTR as mc
JOIN t.oi_personal_emp INNER tp.oi_personal_emp, te.oi_contrato RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_contrato, tu.oi_posicion RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_posicion_ult, ti.oi_puesto RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_puesto_ult, tq.oi_unidad_tiempo RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_unidad_tiempo, ta.oi_agencia RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_agencia, t08.oi_centro_costo RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_ctro_costo_ult, t18c.oi_categoria INNER tp.oi_categoria_ult, t18.oi_convenio INNER t18c.oi_convenio, t03f.oi_funcion RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_funcion, t11.oi_tipo_personal RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_tipo_personal, t06.oi_obra_social RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_obra_social, t06p.oi_plan_os RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_plan_os, t30.oi_sindicato RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_sindicato, per22.oi_motivo_eg_per RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_motivo_eg_per, per07.oi_tipo_servicio RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_tipo_servicio, per25.oi_seguro_soc RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_seguro_soc, per21.oi_indic_activo RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_indic_activo, per31.oi_forma_pago RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_forma_pago, org03u.oi_ubicacion RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_ubicacion, liq22s.oi_sucursal RIGHT OUTER t.oi_sucursal, mc.oi_mod_contr RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_mod_contr, per31p.oi_forma_pago RIGHT OUTER t.oi_forma_pago_alt
where tt.oi_empresa_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa_ddo} and tp.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY e_numero_legajo ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql2
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.n_valor , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ07_VAL_VAREA as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE t.oi_personal_emp= {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} ORDER BY c_variable ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3A
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT tr.c_item_ig , tv.c_entidad_ig , l.f_pago, t.n_importe, t.e_p_deduc FROM LIQ07_DEDUC_IG as t , LIQ04_ITEMS_IG as tr, LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG as tv, liq19_liquidacion as l JOIN t.oi_item_ig INNER tr.oi_item_ig, t.oi_entidad_ig LEFT OUTER tv.oi_entidad_ig WHERE t.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} and l.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} and t.c_tipo = \'A\' AND GETMONTH(l.f_pago) = 12 AND t.e_anio = GETYEAR(l.f_pago) ORDER BY c_item_ig ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql3M
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT tr.c_item_ig , tv.c_entidad_ig , l.f_pago, t.n_importe, GETMONTH(l.f_pago) as fp, t.e_periodo_des as pd, t.e_periodo_has as ph , t.e_periodo_des, t.e_anio, t.e_p_deduc FROM LIQ07_DEDUC_IG as t , LIQ04_ITEMS_IG as tr, LIQ05_ENTIDADES_IG as tv, liq19_liquidacion as l JOIN t.oi_item_ig INNER tr.oi_item_ig, t.oi_entidad_ig LEFT OUTER tv.oi_entidad_ig WHERE t.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} and l.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} and t.c_tipo = \'M\' AND (t.e_periodo_des <= (GETYEAR(l.f_pago)*100)+GETMONTH(l.f_pago)) and t.e_anio = GETYEAR(l.f_pago) ORDER BY c_item_ig ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql4
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT tr.c_beneficio , t.f_desde , t.f_hasta , t.n_valor , t.oi_personal_emp FROM PER02_BENEF_PER as t , ORG23_BENEFICIOS as tr JOIN t.oi_beneficio INNER tr.oi_beneficio WHERE t.oi_personal_emp={#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY c_beneficio ASC, f_desde ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql5
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT tr.c_bien_cargo , t.f_desde , t.f_hasta , t.n_valor
FROM PER02_BS_CARGO_PER as t, ORG14_BIENES_CARGO as tr
JOIN t.oi_bien_cargo INNER tr.oi_bien_cargo
WHERE t.oi_personal_emp={#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY c_bien_cargo ASC, f_desde ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql6
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_licencia_per, tr.c_licencia , t.f_inicio , t.f_fin , t.e_cant_dias , t.e_anio_corresp , t.f_notificacion, t.f_interrupcion, t.oi_personal_emp, tr.c_sit_esp_sijp FROM PER02_LICEN_PER as t, PER16_LICENCIAS as tr JOIN t.oi_licencia INNER tr.oi_licencia WHERE t.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY c_licencia ASC, f_inicio ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql6.1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.e_cant, t.e_anio FROM PER02_LIC_PERIODO as t WHERE t.oi_licencia_per = {#PARAM:@oi_licencia_per} Order by e_anio ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql7
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT tr.c_estudio , tv.c_nivel_estudio , te.c_tipo_establecim , t.f_ini_estudio , t.f_fin_estudio , tq.c_estado_est , t.l_est_extranjero , t.e_duracion_estudio , tu.c_unidad_tiempo , t.e_periodo_en_curso , t.e_mat_adeudadas , t.f_actualiz , t.n_promedio
FROM PER01_ESTUDIOS_PER as t, ORG11_ESTUDIOS as tr, PER12_NIVELES_EST as tv, PER23_T_EST_EDUC as te, PER13_ESTADOS_EST as tq, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO as tu
JOIN t.oi_estudio LEFT OUTER tr.oi_estudio, t.oi_nivel_estudio LEFT OUTER tv.oi_nivel_estudio, t.oi_tipo_establecim LEFT OUTER te.oi_tipo_establecim, t.oi_estado_est LEFT OUTER tq.oi_estado_est, t.oi_unidad_tiempo LEFT OUTER tu.oi_unidad_tiempo
WHERE t.oi_personal = {#PARAM:@oi_personal} ORDER BY c_estudio ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql8
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT tr.c_centro_costo , t.n_p_distrib FROM LIQ07_DISTRIB_COS as t , ORG08_CS_COSTO AS tr JOIN t.oi_centro_costo INNER tr.oi_centro_costo WHERE t.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY c_centro_costo ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql9
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.n_valor , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable , t.e_periodo FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ07_VAL_VAREF as t, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS l JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE t.oi_personal_emp= {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} and (isnull(t.e_periodo) OR (t.e_periodo >= l.e_periodo)) AND l.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ORDER BY c_variable ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql10
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT t.c_familiar , PER20.c_tipo_documento , t.c_nro_documento , per15.c_tipo_familiar , t.d_apellido , t.d_nombres , t.d_ape_y_nom , t.f_nacimiento , t.l_vive , t.f_fallecimiento , t.l_discapacidad , per18.c_ocupacion_fam , t.o_ocupacion , per24.c_grado_escol , org11.c_estudio , t.e_duracion_estudio , org25.c_unidad_tiempo , t.e_periodo_en_curso , t.e_anio_inic_esc , t.e_anio_fin_esc , t.c_nro_cuil , org22.c_estado_civil , org12.c_nacionalidad , t.c_sexo , t.l_reside_pais , t.l_acargo_af , t.o_acargo_af , t.l_acargo_os , t.o_acargo_os , t.l_acargo_IG , t.o_acargo_ig , t.f_desde_IG , t.f_hasta_IG , t.c_nro_seguro_soc , t.d_resp_exp_doc , per08.c_nivel_escol
FROM PER01_FLIARES_PER as t , PER20_TIPOS_DOC as per20, PER15_TIPOS_FAM as per15, PER18_OCUP_FAM as per18, PER24_GRADOS_ESCOL as per24, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO as org25, ORG11_ESTUDIOS as org11, PER08_NIVELES_ESC as PER08, ORG12_NACIONALID as ORG12, ORG22_EST_CIVIL as org22 join t.oi_tipo_documento LEFT OUTER per20.oi_tipo_documento, t.oi_tipo_familiar LEFT OUTER per15.oi_tipo_familiar , t.oi_ocupacion_fam LEFT OUTER per18.oi_ocupacion_fam , t.oi_grado_escol LEFT OUTER per24.oi_grado_escol , t.oi_unidad_tiempo LEFT OUTER org25.oi_unidad_tiempo , t.oi_estudio LEFT OUTER org11.oi_estudio , t.oi_nivel_escol LEFT OUTER per08.oi_nivel_escol , t.oi_nacionalidad LEFT OUTER org12.oi_nacionalidad , t.oi_estado_civil LEFT OUTER org22.oi_estado_civil WHERE t.oi_personal = {#PARAM:@oi_personal} ORDER BY c_familiar ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql11
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.e_nro_oficio , t.f_recepcion , t.c_tipo_embargo , t.f_inicio , t.l_liquida , t.c_estado , t.n_porc_emb , t.l_sueldo_bruto , t.l_sueldo_neto , t.n_monto_fijo , t.n_monto_total , t.n_monto_pend , t.oi_embargo FROM LIQ07_EMBARGOS as t WHERE t.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY e_nro_oficio ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql12
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT t.n_porcen , tr.c_concepto, tq.oi_concepto_ddo
FROM LIQ07_CONC_EMB_CA as t, LIQ14_CONCEPTOS as tr, LIQ96_CONCEPTOS as tq
JOIN t.oi_concepto INNER tr.oi_concepto, tr.c_concepto INNER tq.c_concepto
WHERE t.oi_embargo = {#PARAM:@oi_embargo} and tq.oi_cab_conc_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_cab_conc_ddo} ORDER BY c_concepto ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql13
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.f_descuento , t.n_importe FROM LIQ07_DESC_EMB as t WHERE t.oi_embargo = {#PARAM:@oi_embargo} ORDER BY f_descuento ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql14

for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_anticipo , A.c_tipo_anticipo , t.f_solicitud , t.f_anticipo , t.n_importe , t.e_cant_cuotas , t.e_periodo , t.e_quincena , t.l_liquida , t.n_imp_pendiente , t.c_estado
FROM LIQ07_ANTICIPOS as t, LIQ33_TIPO_ANTICIPOS as A JOIN t.oi_tipo_anticipo LEFT OUTER A.oi_tipo_anticipo WHERE t.l_liquida = 1 and t.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY f_solicitud ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql15
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.e_cuota , t.f_descuento , t.n_importe , t.c_estado FROM LIQ07_DESC_ANTI as t WHERE t.oi_anticipo = {#PARAM:@oi_anticipo} ORDER BY e_cuota ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select t.version, t.policy, t.new_user, t.new_time, t.edit_user, t.edit_time, t.del_user, t.del_time from NMD_SECURITY as t where t.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.LegajoEmpresaDDO.PER_EMP_DDO\' and t.id={#PARAM:@id}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1.1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select per27.c_calificacion , org22.c_estado_civil , per03.c_afjp , org19.c_localidad as c_localidad_suc , tr.c_sexo , tr.c_personal , tr.d_ape_y_nom , tr.f_nacim , tr.l_jubilado, tr.c_nro_cuil, tr.c_nro_documento, per20.c_tipo_documento from per01_personal as tr, PER27_CALIFICACIONES as per27, PER03_AFJP as per03, ORG22_EST_CIVIL as org22, org19_localidades as org19, PER20_TIPOS_DOC as per20 JOIN per27.oi_calificacion RIGHT OUTER tr.oi_calificacion, per03.oi_afjp RIGHT OUTER tr.oi_afjp, org22.oi_estado_civil RIGHT OUTER tr.oi_estado_civil, org19.oi_localidad RIGHT OUTER tr.oi_localidad, per20.oi_tipo_documento INNER tr.oi_tipo_documento where tr.oi_personal = {#PARAM:@oi_personal}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qry_PARAMETRO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT ORG26_PARAMETROS.oi_parametro, LIQ07_PARAM_PER.d_valor, ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro FROM LIQ07_PARAM_PER , ORG26_PARAMETROS , LIQ94_PARAMETROS JOIN LIQ07_PARAM_PER.oi_parametro INNER ORG26_PARAMETROS.oi_parametro , ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_modulo INNER LIQ94_PARAMETROS.c_modulo , ORG26_PARAMETROS.c_parametro INNER LIQ94_PARAMETROS.c_parametro , ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_clase INNER LIQ94_PARAMETROS.d_clase , ORG26_PARAMETROS.d_tipo_parametro INNER LIQ94_PARAMETROS.d_tipo_parametro WHERE LIQ94_PARAMETROS.oi_codif_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_codif_ddo} and LIQ07_PARAM_PER.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY c_parametro ASC, oi_parametro ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql16

for $r in sql('
SELECT t.n_valor , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable, t.e_periodo FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ07_VAL_VARPA as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE t.oi_personal_emp= {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp} and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql17
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select t.oi_personal_emp, t.c_consumo_per, t.f_consumo, t.e_importe, t.c_estado, t.d_observaciones, c.c_consumo, L.c_liquidacion, TC.c_tipo_consumo, FROM LIQ07_CONSUMO_PER as t, LIQ08_CONSUMOS as C, LIQ08_TIPO_CONSUMO as TC JOIN t.oi_consumo INNER C.oi_consumo, t.oi_tipo_consumo INNER TC.oi_tipo_consumo WHERE t.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp}
ORDER by f_consumo ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

tp.n_porc_jor_red, tp.f_egreso, tp.c_nro_obra_social, tp.f_desde_posicion, tp.f_desde_puesto, tp.f_desde_ccosto, tp.f_desde_categoria, tp.n_est_pas_mes, tp.c_nro_sindicato, tp.c_nro_seguro_soc, tp.f_ult_notif, tp.n_ult_remun, tp.f_desde_remun, tp.l_disponib_viajar, tt.c_empresa,te.c_contrato,tu.c_posicion as c_posicion_ult,ta.c_agencia,ti.c_puesto as c_puesto_ult,t08.c_centro_costo as c_centro_costo_ult, t03f.c_funcion,t11.c_tipo_personal,t06.c_obra_social,per22.c_motivo_eg_per as c_motivo_eg,t06p.c_plan_os, t30.c_sindicato,per07.c_tipo_servicio,per25.c_seguro_soc,per21.c_indic_activo, org03u.c_ubicacion,tq.c_unidad_tiempo,mc.c_mod_contr, tp.l_afiliado_sind FROM LIQ93_EMPRESAS as tt, per02_personal_emp as tp, PER28_CONTRATOS as te, ORG04_POSICIONES as tu, ORG04_PUESTOS as ti, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO as tq, PER32_AGENCIAS as ta, ORG08_CS_COSTO as t08, ORG03_FUNCIONES as t03f, PER11_TIPOS_PERS as t11, PER06_OBRAS_SOC as t06, PER06_PLANES_OS as t06p, PER30_SINDICATOS as t30, PER22_MOT_EG_PER as per22, PER07_TIPOS_SERV as per07, PER25_SEGUROS_SOC as per25, PER21_INDIC_ACTIVO as per21, org03_ubicaciones as org03u, PER35_MOD_CONTR as mc JOIN te.oi_contrato RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_contrato, tu.oi_posicion RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_posicion_ult, ti.oi_puesto RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_puesto_ult, tq.oi_unidad_tiempo RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_unidad_tiempo, ta.oi_agencia RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_agencia, t08.oi_centro_costo RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_ctro_costo_ult, t03f.oi_funcion RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_funcion, t11.oi_tipo_personal RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_tipo_personal, t06.oi_obra_social RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_obra_social, t06p.oi_plan_os RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_plan_os, t30.oi_sindicato RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_sindicato, per22.oi_motivo_eg_per RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_motivo_eg_per, per07.oi_tipo_servicio RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_tipo_servicio, per25.oi_seguro_soc RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_seguro_soc, per21.oi_indic_activo RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_indic_activo, org03u.oi_ubicacion RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_ubicacion, mc.oi_mod_contr RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_mod_contr where tt.oi_empresa_ddo={#PARAM:@oi_empresa_ddo} and tp.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp%}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1.1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT tp.oi_personal_emp, t18c.c_categoria as c_categoria_ult, t18c.c_cargo_siafca, t18c.c_clase_cargo, t18.c_convenio FROM per02_personal_emp as tp, ORG18_CATEGORIAS as t18c, ORG18_CONVENIOS as t18 JOIN t18c.oi_categoria INNER tp.oi_categoria_ult, t18.oi_convenio INNER t18c.oi_convenio where tp.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp%}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1.2
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT tp.oi_personal_emp, liq22s.c_sucursal, liq22s.d_sucursal, liq22s.c_banco, liq22s.d_banco, liq22s.oi_banco, mc.c_mod_contr, per31p.c_forma_pago as forma_pago_alt, per31.c_forma_pago, t.n_bruto_ant, t.n_deduc_ant, t.n_reten_ant, t.n_bruto_nr_ant, t.n_ap_jub_ant, t.n_ap_os_ant, t.n_ap_ley_ant, t.l_agente_ret, t.c_cta_bancaria, t.c_tarjeta, t.c_cbu
FROM LIQ07_PERSONAL as t, per02_personal_emp as tp, (SELECT L.oi_sucursal,L.oi_banco,L.c_sucursal,L.d_sucursal, L2.c_banco, L2.d_banco FROM LIQ22_BANCOS_SUCUR as L, LIQ22_BANCOS as L2 JOIN L.oi_banco INNER L2.oi_banco) as liq22s, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as per31p, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as per31, PER35_MOD_CONTR as mc JOIN t.oi_personal_emp RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_personal_emp, liq22s.oi_sucursal RIGHT OUTER t.oi_sucursal, mc.oi_mod_contr RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_mod_contr, per31p.oi_forma_pago RIGHT OUTER t.oi_forma_pago_alt, per31.oi_forma_pago RIGHT OUTER tp.oi_forma_pago
where tp.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp%}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1.3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('select tp.oi_personal_emp , per27.c_calificacion , org22.c_estado_civil , per03.c_afjp , tr.c_sexo , tr.c_personal , tr.d_ape_y_nom , tr.f_nacim , tr.l_jubilado, tr.c_nro_cuil, tr.c_nro_documento, per20.c_tipo_documento, PS.c_provincia as c_provincia_suc, PS.c_localidad as c_localidad_suc from per02_personal_emp as tp, per01_personal as tr, PER27_CALIFICACIONES as per27, PER03_AFJP as per03, ORG22_EST_CIVIL as org22, PER20_TIPOS_DOC as per20, (select org35.c_provincia,org19.oi_localidad,org19.c_localidad from org35_provincias as org35, org19_localidades as org19 JOIN org35.oi_provincia INNER org19.oi_provincia) as PS JOIN tp.oi_personal INNER tr.oi_personal, per27.oi_calificacion RIGHT OUTER tr.oi_calificacion, per03.oi_afjp RIGHT OUTER tr.oi_afjp, org22.oi_estado_civil RIGHT OUTER tr.oi_estado_civil, PS.oi_localidad RIGHT OUTER tr.oi_localidad, per20.oi_tipo_documento INNER tr.oi_tipo_documento where tp.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesAcum
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_personal_emp, t.n_valor , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ07_VAL_VAREA as t JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} and t.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Beneficios
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT tr.c_beneficio , t.f_desde , t.f_hasta , t.n_valor , t.oi_personal_emp FROM PER02_BENEF_PER as t , ORG23_BENEFICIOS as tr JOIN t.oi_beneficio INNER tr.oi_beneficio WHERE t.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_beneficio ASC, f_desde ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Bienes
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_personal_emp, tr.c_bien_cargo , t.f_desde , t.f_hasta , t.n_valor

JOIN t.oi_bien_cargo INNER tr.oi_bien_cargo
WHERE t.oi_personal_emp in ({%= #PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_bien_cargo ASC, f_desde ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Licencias
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_personal_emp, t.oi_licencia_per, tr.c_licencia , t.f_inicio , t.f_fin , t.e_cant_dias , t.e_anio_corresp , t.f_notificacion, t.f_interrupcion, t.l_habiles, t.d_habiles, tr.c_sit_esp_sijp FROM PER02_LICEN_PER as t, PER16_LICENCIAS as tr JOIN t.oi_licencia INNER tr.oi_licencia WHERE t.oi_personal_emp in ({%= #PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) and ( GETPER(t.f_fin) >={number(1+100*(number(substring($PARAM/@e_periodo,0,4))-1))} AND GETPER(t.f_inicio) <={number(6+100*(number(substring($PARAM/@e_periodo,0,4))+ 1))}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_licencia ASC, f_inicio ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Estudios
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT pe.oi_personal_emp , tr.c_estudio , ae.c_area_est , tv.c_nivel_estudio , te.c_tipo_establecim , t.f_ini_estudio , t.f_fin_estudio , tq.c_estado_est , t.l_est_extranjero , t.e_duracion_estudio , tu.c_unidad_tiempo , t.e_periodo_en_curso , t.e_mat_adeudadas , t.f_actualiz , t.n_promedio, t.oi_estudio_per
FROM PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as pe, PER01_ESTUDIOS_PER as t, ORG11_ESTUDIOS as tr, PER12_NIVELES_EST as tv, PER23_T_EST_EDUC as te, PER13_ESTADOS_EST as tq, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO as tu, ORG43_AREAS_EST as ae
JOIN t.oi_personal INNER pe.oi_personal, t.oi_estudio LEFT OUTER tr.oi_estudio, t.oi_area_est LEFT OUTER ae.oi_area_est, t.oi_nivel_estudio LEFT OUTER tv.oi_nivel_estudio, t.oi_tipo_establecim LEFT OUTER te.oi_tipo_establecim, t.oi_estado_est LEFT OUTER tq.oi_estado_est, t.oi_unidad_tiempo LEFT OUTER tu.oi_unidad_tiempo
WHERE pe.oi_personal_emp in ({%= #PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_estudio ASC, oi_estudio_per ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: DistribucionCostos
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_personal_emp , tr.c_centro_costo , t.n_p_distrib FROM LIQ07_DISTRIB_COS as t , ORG08_CS_COSTO AS tr JOIN t.oi_centro_costo INNER tr.oi_centro_costo WHERE t.oi_personal_emp in ({%= #PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_centro_costo ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: VariablesFijas
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.oi_personal_emp, t.n_valor , tt.oi_variable_ddo, tt.c_variable , t.e_periodo FROM LIQ95_VARIABLES as tt, liq09_variables as tv, LIQ07_VAL_VAREF as t, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION AS l JOIN tv.c_variable INNER tt.c_variable, t.oi_variable INNER tv.oi_variable WHERE t.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %} ) and tt.oi_var_ejec_ddo = {#PARAM:@oi_var_ejec_ddo} and (isnull(t.e_periodo) OR (t.e_periodo >= l.e_periodo)) AND l.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_variable ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql('SELECT pe.oi_personal_emp, t.c_familiar , PER20.c_tipo_documento , t.c_nro_documento , per15.c_tipo_familiar , t.d_apellido , t.d_nombres , t.d_ape_y_nom , t.f_nacimiento , t.l_vive , t.f_fallecimiento , t.l_discapacidad , per18.c_ocupacion_fam , t.o_ocupacion , per24.c_grado_escol , org11.c_estudio , t.e_duracion_estudio , org25.c_unidad_tiempo , t.e_periodo_en_curso , t.e_anio_inic_esc , t.e_anio_fin_esc , t.c_nro_cuil , org22.c_estado_civil , org12.c_nacionalidad , t.c_sexo , t.l_reside_pais , t.l_acargo_af , t.o_acargo_af , t.l_acargo_os , t.o_acargo_os , t.l_acargo_IG , t.o_acargo_ig , t.f_desde_IG , t.f_hasta_IG , t.c_nro_seguro_soc , t.d_resp_exp_doc , per08.c_nivel_escol
FROM PER01_FLIARES_PER as t , PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as pe, PER20_TIPOS_DOC as per20, PER15_TIPOS_FAM as per15, PER18_OCUP_FAM as per18, PER24_GRADOS_ESCOL as per24, ORG25_UNIDADES_TPO as org25, ORG11_ESTUDIOS as org11, PER08_NIVELES_ESC as PER08, ORG12_NACIONALID as ORG12, ORG22_EST_CIVIL as org22 join pe.oi_personal INNER t.oi_personal, t.oi_tipo_documento LEFT OUTER per20.oi_tipo_documento, t.oi_tipo_familiar LEFT OUTER per15.oi_tipo_familiar , t.oi_ocupacion_fam LEFT OUTER per18.oi_ocupacion_fam , t.oi_grado_escol LEFT OUTER per24.oi_grado_escol , t.oi_unidad_tiempo LEFT OUTER org25.oi_unidad_tiempo , t.oi_estudio LEFT OUTER org11.oi_estudio , t.oi_nivel_escol LEFT OUTER per08.oi_nivel_escol , t.oi_nacionalidad LEFT OUTER org12.oi_nacionalidad , t.oi_estado_civil LEFT OUTER org22.oi_estado_civil WHERE pe.oi_personal_emp in ({%=#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp %}) ORDER BY oi_personal_emp ASC, c_familiar ASC')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: Embargos
